title: ActiveCampaign vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and Loops comes down to your specific use case. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm
comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Loops?
faq.a: ActiveCampaign starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
